title: Diamond Block Armor
description: Craft new powerful armor with diamond blocks.
body:
Adds the option to craft new diamond armor from diamond blocks. The armor has 9x better stats than regular diamond armor, however, as it is 9x more expensive, it doesn't feel too OP and more like a reward for your hard work.

notes: -the armor has the same textures as regular diamond armor
       -not all stats could be multiplied by 9 so these values were set to the maximum.
